title: [codereview-pass-3] draft-lichen-schc-lora-00.md: minor spec style - tables could cross-reference appendix A.1 explicitly; CoAP table now matches A.2 but intro could note alignment with adaptation layer rules P4
description: Readability improvement. Section 4 now aligns tables with appendix A.1 (ICMP rule 2) and adaptation MQTT-SN rule. Add sentence noting 'These rules supersede prior versions in 03-adaptation.md and appendix-schc.md A.1'. Low priority documentation consistency.
